tasks.title: Audit AuthRequiredPopover.client.tsx props interface
tasks.description: Read apps/web/src/components/auth/AuthRequiredPopover.client.tsx and verify whether title and message props exist. If missing, add them with backward-compatible defaults so the component can be reused for the favorites context without breaking existing usage. Document findings in a code comment.

tasks.title: Audit DestinationsIsland.client.tsx integration point
tasks.description: Read apps/web/src/components/sections/DestinationsIsland.client.tsx and identify the exact JSX location where destination card items render. Mark the integration point with a TODO comment referencing SPEC-098 Phase 6. No functional change needed — audit only.

tasks.title: Verify enforceFavoritesLimit middleware and bookmark limit value
tasks.description: Locate the enforceFavoritesLimit middleware in apps/api/src/ and read its current bookmark limit constant. Add a code comment documenting the limit value and its origin (billing plan or hardcoded). No code change unless the middleware is missing.

tasks.title: Verify existence of GET /public/user-bookmarks/count endpoint
tasks.description: Search apps/api/src/routes/public/ for an existing user-bookmarks count endpoint. If found, document its path; if absent, note that T-028 must create it. No code change in this task — audit only. Record result in a TODO comment near the public router registration.

tasks.title: Create user_bookmark_collections Drizzle schema
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/schema/userBookmarkCollection.model.ts with the full Drizzle table definition for user_bookmark_collections as specified in spec section 6.1. Include all columns: id, userId, name, description, color, icon, createdAt, updatedAt, deletedAt, createdById, updatedById, deletedById. Export the table as userBookmarkCollections. Schema changes are applied via drizzle-kit push (pnpm db:fresh-dev) — no numbered migration file needed.

tasks.title: Add collectionId nullable FK column to user_bookmarks schema
tasks.description: Modify packages/db/src/schema/userBookmark.model.ts to add the collectionId nullable UUID foreign key referencing user_bookmark_collections.id with ON DELETE SET NULL. Also add notes varchar(500) nullable column if not present. Update the model export. Apply via pnpm db:fresh-dev.

tasks.title: Add Drizzle relations for collections and bookmarks
tasks.description: Add Drizzle relations in packages/db/src/schema/relations.ts (or the appropriate relations file): user -> collections (one-to-many), collection -> user (many-to-one), collection -> bookmarks (one-to-many), bookmark -> collection (many-to-one). Follow existing relation patterns in the codebase.

tasks.title: Write manual SQL for collection indexes and partial unique constraint
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/migrations/manual/0010-user-bookmark-collections-indexes.sql with: (1) composite index idx_user_bookmark_collections_user_active on (user_id, deleted_at), (2) partial unique index uq_user_bookmark_collections_user_name_active on (user_id, name) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL. These cannot be generated by drizzle-kit push. Follow spec section 6.1 exactly.

tasks.title: Write manual SQL for user_bookmarks entity performance index
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/migrations/manual/0011-user-bookmarks-entity-index.sql with: CREATE INDEX idx_user_bookmarks_entity_active ON user_bookmarks (entity_id, entity_type, deleted_at). This index is required before the public count endpoint and Most Saved sort go live. Follow spec section 6.3. [Consolidated into T-052 — index 0019_user_bookmarks_entity_active_index.sql already created.]

tasks.title: Update apply-postgres-extras.sh to include new manual SQL files
tasks.description: Modify packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.sh to source and execute the two new manual SQL files: 0010-user-bookmark-collections-indexes.sql and 0011-user-bookmarks-entity-index.sql. Add comments documenting what each file does. Ensure the script remains idempotent (use IF NOT EXISTS or DROP INDEX IF EXISTS). [Consolidated — apply-postgres-extras.sh already auto-discovers via find ... | sort, no explicit registration needed.]

tasks.title: Create UserBookmarkCollectionModel class skeleton
tasks.description: Create packages/db/src/models/userBookmarkCollection.model.ts extending BaseModel<UserBookmarkCollection>. Set up the class structure, constructor, table reference, and all import statements following the existing model patterns (e.g. userBookmark.model.ts). Include stubs for all methods: findById, findByUserId, create, update, softDelete, listByUser. No implementation yet — method bodies throw new Error('not implemented').

tasks.title: Implement CRUD methods on UserBookmarkCollectionModel
tasks.description: Fill in the implementations for findById, findByUserId, create, update, softDelete in packages/db/src/models/userBookmarkCollection.model.ts. Use standard Drizzle query patterns matching the existing codebase. Each method must handle the soft-delete pattern (filter deleted_at IS NULL by default).

tasks.title: Implement listByUser method with optional bookmark count on UserBookmarkCollectionModel
tasks.description: Implement the listByUser method in packages/db/src/models/userBookmarkCollection.model.ts. When includeBookmarkCount=true, use a LEFT JOIN subquery on user_bookmarks to count active bookmarks per collection. Returns paginated results of UserBookmarkCollectionWithCount. Follow spec section 6.1 and existing pagination patterns.

tasks.title: Add checkBookmarksBulk query method to UserBookmarkModel
tasks.description: Modify packages/db/src/models/userBookmark.model.ts to add a checkBulk method that accepts userId and an array of {entityId, entityType} pairs and returns saved status using a single WHERE (entity_id, entity_type) IN (...) query. Never call findExistingBookmark in a loop. Follow spec section 9.2 for the BulkCheckResult type. [Consolidated — T-012 by T-041 (checkBookmarksBulk in service); T-043 by T-DC3 (FavoriteButton already in DestinationsIsland).]

tasks.title: Create UserBookmarkCollection base and entity Zod schemas
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/entities/userBookmarkCollection/userBookmarkCollection.base.schema.ts with the core entity shape and packages/schemas/src/entities/userBookmarkCollection/userBookmarkCollection.schema.ts for the full entity. Mirror the structure of existing userBookmark/ schema files. Include the bookmarkCount optional field for list responses.

tasks.title: Create UserBookmarkCollection CRUD Zod schemas (create, update)
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/entities/userBookmarkCollection/userBookmarkCollection.crud.schema.ts with CreateUserBookmarkCollectionSchema (name required max 50, description optional max 200, color optional 7-char hex, icon optional max 50) and UpdateUserBookmarkCollectionSchema (all fields optional, strict mode). Follow spec section 7.1 and 7.4.

tasks.title: Create UserBookmarkCollection query, http, access, and params schemas
tasks.description: Create the remaining schema files in packages/schemas/src/entities/userBookmarkCollection/: query.schema.ts (page, pageSize, includeBookmarkCount, entityType filter), http.schema.ts (request/response shapes), access.schema.ts (owner checks), params.schema.ts (id, bookmarkId URL params). Create index.ts re-exporting all. Mirror userBookmark/ structure. [Note: discovered EntityTypeEnum import bug in existing userBookmark.http.schema.ts at line 127 — flagged but not fixed in this task.]

tasks.title: Add BulkCheckInputSchema and BulkCheckResultSchema to userBookmark http schemas
tasks.description: Modify packages/schemas/src/entities/userBookmark/userBookmark.http.schema.ts to add BulkCheckInputSchema (items array max 50, each with entityId UUID and entityType enum) and BulkCheckResultSchema. Also add notes field (string max 500, optional, nullable) to UpdateUserBookmarkSchema. Follow spec sections 7.8 and 7.9.

tasks.title: Add 5 USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION permissions to permission enum
tasks.description: Modify packages/schemas/src/enums/permission.enum.ts to add 5 new permissions: USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_CREATE, USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_UPDATE, USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_DELETE, USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_VIEW, USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_VIEW_ANY. Add a comment block explaining VIEW_ANY is scaffolded for future admin UI. Follow spec section 8 exactly.

tasks.title: Add role-permission assignments for collection permissions
tasks.description: Modify packages/db/src/seeds/rolePermissions.seed.ts to assign the 5 new USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_* permissions per the matrix in spec section 8: CREATE/UPDATE/DELETE/VIEW for USER, OWNER, ADMIN, SUPER_ADMIN; VIEW_ANY for ADMIN and SUPER_ADMIN only.

tasks.title: Create UserBookmarkCollectionService skeleton extending BaseCrudService
tasks.description: Create packages/service-core/src/services/userBookmarkCollection/userBookmarkCollection.service.ts extending BaseCrudService<UserBookmarkCollection>. Add the naming-split JSDoc comment as specified in spec section 9.1. Stub all 8 method signatures (createCollection, listCollectionsByUser, getCollectionById, updateCollection, deleteCollection, addBookmarkToCollection, removeBookmarkFromCollection, countActiveCollections) with throw new Error('not implemented') bodies. Add all error code constants.

tasks.title: Implement countActiveCollections service method
tasks.description: Implement countActiveCollections in UserBookmarkCollectionService: COUNT query for active (non-deleted) collections by userId via model. Returns number. This is a prerequisite for the limit check in createCollection. Follow spec section 9.1.

tasks.title: Implement createCollection service method
tasks.description: Implement createCollection in UserBookmarkCollectionService: check collection limit via _canCreate guard (reads HOSPEDA_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER env var, default 10) using countActiveCollections result. Validate unique name. Insert via model. Return Result<UserBookmarkCollection>. Use DB transaction for count + insert to prevent concurrent bypass. Return typed error codes: COLLECTION_LIMIT_REACHED (with { currentCount, maxAllowed } in error payload), COLLECTION_NAME_DUPLICATE. Follow spec section 9.1.

tasks.title: Implement listCollectionsByUser service method
tasks.description: Implement listCollectionsByUser in UserBookmarkCollectionService. Accepts userId, pagination, and optional includeBookmarkCount flag. When includeBookmarkCount=true, use a LEFT JOIN subquery on user_bookmarks to count active bookmarks per collection. Returns PaginatedResult<UserBookmarkCollectionWithCount>. Follow spec section 9.1.

tasks.title: Implement getCollectionById service method
tasks.description: Implement getCollectionById in UserBookmarkCollectionService: owner-verified fetch, supports nested bookmark pagination and entityType filter. Returns COLLECTION_NOT_FOUND and COLLECTION_ACCESS_DENIED typed error codes. Follow spec section 9.1.

tasks.title: Implement updateCollection service method
tasks.description: Implement updateCollection in UserBookmarkCollectionService: owner check, unique-name validation against existing active collections for that user (excluding the current collection), PATCH via model. Return appropriate error codes. Follow spec section 9.1.

tasks.title: Implement deleteCollection service method
tasks.description: Implement deleteCollection in UserBookmarkCollectionService. Owner check required. Soft-delete the collection row; the ON DELETE SET NULL FK will automatically null out bookmark.collectionId. Count affected bookmarks before deletion via a SELECT COUNT. Return Result<{ affectedBookmarks: number }>. Wrap in a DB transaction. Follow spec section 9.1.

tasks.title: Implement addBookmarkToCollection and removeBookmarkFromCollection methods
tasks.description: Implement addBookmarkToCollection (verify ownership of both collection and bookmark, update bookmark.collectionId, idempotent if already assigned) and removeBookmarkFromCollection (set collectionId = NULL, no-op if already null) in UserBookmarkCollectionService. Return appropriate error codes: BOOKMARK_NOT_FOUND, BOOKMARK_ACCESS_DENIED. Follow spec section 9.1.

tasks.title: Register HOSPEDA_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER env var in packages/config
tasks.description: Find the env registry in packages/config (e.g. packages/config/src/env.schema.ts or similar — verify by searching). Add HOSPEDA_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER as a number env var with: default 10, min 1, max 10000. The decision log: collections limit is hardcoded env-configurable, NOT plan-based. No enforceCollectionsLimit middleware is created — the guard lives in UserBookmarkCollectionService._canCreate. Remove any stale reference to a middleware in related route tasks if present.

tasks.title: Implement POST /protected/user-bookmark-collections route
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/protected/user-bookmark-collections/create.ts using createSimpleRoute factory. Validate body with CreateUserBookmarkCollectionSchema. Call UserBookmarkCollectionService.createCollection (which enforces the limit internally via _canCreate guard — no external middleware needed). Return 201 with collection object. Return 409 for duplicate name, 422 with COLLECTION_LIMIT_REACHED (includes currentCount and maxAllowed fields) for limit exceeded. Register route in protected router.

tasks.title: Implement GET /protected/user-bookmark-collections (list) route
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/protected/user-bookmark-collections/list.ts using createListRoute factory. Validate query params (page, pageSize, includeBookmarkCount). Call listCollectionsByUser. Return paginated response. Require USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_VIEW permission.

tasks.title: Create GET /public/user-bookmarks/count endpoint from scratch
tasks.description: Create the apps/api/src/routes/user-bookmark/public/ folder (it does not exist — T-004 audit confirmed). Add count.ts route handler for GET /api/v1/public/user-bookmarks/count?entityType=&entityId=. Calls userBookmarkService.countBookmarksForEntity (which permits anonymous actor). Use route factory createPublicRoute consistent with other public endpoints — verify pattern via apps/api/src/routes/accommodation/public/. Register the public route in apps/api/src/routes/user-bookmark/index.ts and the central router at apps/api/src/routes/index.ts. Add Cache-Control: max-age=60, stale-while-revalidate=300 header.

tasks.title: Implement GET /protected/user-bookmark-collections/:id route
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/protected/user-bookmark-collections/getById.ts. Validate path param id as UUID. Validate query params (bookmarksPage, bookmarksPageSize, entityType). Call getCollectionById. Return 403 for wrong owner, 404 for not found, 200 with collection + nested bookmarks. Require USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_VIEW permission.

tasks.title: Implement PATCH and DELETE /protected/user-bookmark-collections/:id routes
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/protected/user-bookmark-collections/update.ts (PATCH, calls updateCollection, handles 409 duplicate name) and delete.ts (DELETE, calls deleteCollection, returns affectedBookmarks in response body). Require USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_UPDATE and USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_DELETE permissions respectively. Register both in the collection router.

tasks.title: Implement POST and DELETE /user-bookmark-collections/:id/bookmarks/:bookmarkId routes
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/protected/user-bookmark-collections/bookmarks.ts with POST handler (calls addBookmarkToCollection, 200 idempotent) and DELETE handler (calls removeBookmarkFromCollection). Validate both id and bookmarkId as UUIDs. Require USER_BOOKMARK_COLLECTION_UPDATE permission. Register in the collection router. Follow spec sections 7.6 and 7.7.

tasks.title: Implement PATCH /protected/user-bookmarks/:id (notes update) route
tasks.description: Create or extend apps/api/src/routes/protected/user-bookmarks/update.ts with a PATCH handler for updating the notes field. Validate body with the updated UpdateUserBookmarkSchema (notes max 500, nullable). Call UserBookmarkService.updateBookmark. Require USER_BOOKMARK_UPDATE permission with ownership check. Follow spec section 7.8.

tasks.title: Implement POST /protected/user-bookmarks/check-bulk route
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/routes/protected/user-bookmarks/checkBulk.ts. Validate body with BulkCheckInputSchema (max 50 items, returns 400 if exceeded). Call UserBookmarkService.checkBookmarksBulk. Return array of BulkCheckResult. Require USER_BOOKMARK_VIEW permission. Register in the protected user-bookmarks router. Follow spec section 7.9. [Consolidated — endpoint created by T-041; canonical schemas moved by T-016.]

tasks.title: Add checkBookmarksBulk and updateBookmark methods to UserBookmarkService
tasks.description: Modify packages/service-core/src/services/userBookmark/userBookmark.service.ts to add checkBookmarksBulk (delegates to model checkBulk, filters by userId) and updateBookmark (owner check, PATCH via model for notes field). Return typed Results. Follow spec section 9.2 for the BulkCheckResult type.

tasks.title: Add i18n keys to account.json for favorites (es, en, pt)
tasks.description: Add all new keys from spec section 11 to packages/i18n/src/locales/es/account.json, en/account.json, and pt/account.json under the favorites namespace: button.*, counter.*, collections.*, move.*, notes.*, toast.*, auth.*. Preserve existing favorites.tabs.* and favorites.empty keys. Add all 3 locales in one task.

tasks.title: Add sort.mostSaved i18n key to accommodations.json (es, en, pt)
tasks.description: Add the sort.mostSaved key to packages/i18n/src/locales/es/accommodations.json, en/accommodations.json, and pt/accommodations.json per spec section 11.8. If a shared sort namespace exists, add it there instead. Also check for events.json and posts.json if they have their own sort keys. [Consolidated into T-035 — keys already added.]

tasks.title: Write unit tests for UserBookmarkCollection schemas
tasks.description: Create packages/schemas/src/entities/userBookmarkCollection/__tests__/userBookmarkCollection.schema.test.ts covering: CreateUserBookmarkCollectionSchema (valid input, name > 50 chars, missing name, invalid color hex, whitespace-only name), UpdateUserBookmarkCollectionSchema (all optional, empty object, extra fields rejected), BulkCheckInputSchema (valid, empty, 51 items). Target 100% coverage on schema files.

tasks.title: Audit bookmark seed data structure for collectionId field addition
tasks.description: Read packages/seed/src/example/bookmarks.seed.ts and the first 5 JSON files in packages/seed/src/data/bookmark/ to understand the current shape. Read packages/seed/src/manifest-example.json to understand the manifest format (key name, file path convention). Document which users have bookmarks so collectionId assignments can be planned for T-S04. No file changes — audit only.

tasks.title: Create example seed JSON files for user_bookmark_collections
tasks.description: Create 8-10 JSON files in packages/seed/src/data/userBookmarkCollection/ (create the directory). Each file represents one collection for a seeded user. Include realistic Spanish-language names (e.g. 'Fin de semana con amigos', 'Ideas luna de miel', 'Para volver a ver', 'Escapadas familiares'). Fields: id (seed ID), userId (seed user ID), name, description (optional), color (optional 7-char hex), icon (optional). Cover at least 3 different users from the existing seed set.

tasks.title: Create userBookmarkCollections.seed.ts using createSeedFactory pattern
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/src/example/userBookmarkCollections.seed.ts. Use the createSeedFactory pattern mirroring bookmarks.seed.ts. Implement a preProcess callback that resolves seed user IDs to real DB IDs via context.idMapper.getMappedUserId(). Use UserBookmarkCollectionService. Point folder to packages/seed/src/data/userBookmarkCollection/ and files from manifest-example.json userBookmarkCollections key.

tasks.title: Update bookmark JSON files and seed to add collectionId field on subset
tasks.description: Update a subset of JSON files in packages/seed/src/data/bookmark/ to add a collectionId field pointing to one of the collection seed IDs created in T-S02. Strategy: user 002 (carlos) all uncollected, user 004 (ana) 2 bookmarks in a collection, user 005 (miguel) 3 bookmarks split across 2 collections. Update bookmarkNormalizer in bookmarks.seed.ts to resolve collectionId via context.idMapper if present, otherwise leave null. The preProcess callback must map collectionId from seed ID to real DB ID.

tasks.title: Register userBookmarkCollections seed in index.ts and manifest-example.json
tasks.description: Update packages/seed/src/example/index.ts to import seedUserBookmarkCollections and call it after seedBookmarks (collections must exist before bookmarks reference them via collectionId — adjust order if needed). Update packages/seed/src/manifest-example.json to add a userBookmarkCollections key with the filenames of the JSON files created in T-S02.

tasks.title: Write unit/integration test for userBookmarkCollections seed
tasks.description: Create packages/seed/test/example/userBookmarkCollections.seed.test.ts. Test that the seed runs without throwing, produces the expected number of collection records (count matches JSON files), and that collectionId on affected bookmarks resolves to a non-null UUID after the bookmark seed runs. Use a test DB or mock context following the pattern of existing seed tests in the package.

tasks.title: Create FavoriteButton.client.tsx skeleton with props interface
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/components/shared/ui/FavoriteButton.client.tsx. Define the full props interface from spec section 10.1 (entityId, entityType, entityName, initialSaved, initialCount, showCount, countThreshold, size, className) as readonly. Set up the component shell with useState hooks for saved/count/pending state. No API calls yet — use prop values as initial state only.

tasks.title: Wire auth detection and AuthRequiredPopover into FavoriteButton
tasks.description: Extend FavoriteButton.client.tsx to detect authentication state using the shared auth context. Implement guest click path: intercept click, show AuthRequiredPopover with i18n message, do not change saved state. Implement optimistic update flow stub (toggle saved state immediately, no API call yet).

tasks.title: Style FavoriteButton with CSS module and count pill
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/components/shared/ui/FavoriteButton.module.css. Implement heart icon styles (filled/unfilled states), size variants (sm/md/lg), pending animation, count pill display (hidden when count < countThreshold, shown otherwise). Follow wireframe 4.1 for visual positioning. Apply CSS module classes to the component.

tasks.title: Wire FavoriteButton toggle API calls (POST/DELETE bookmark)
tasks.description: Extend FavoriteButton.client.tsx: on authenticated click call POST /api/v1/protected/user-bookmarks (to save) or DELETE /api/v1/protected/user-bookmarks/:id (to remove). Implement optimistic update with toast rollback on API error. Debounce re-clicks during pending state. Use i18n keys from T-035 for toast messages.

tasks.title: Wire FavoriteButton single-check fallback on mount
tasks.description: Extend FavoriteButton.client.tsx: on mount, if initialSaved is undefined and user is authenticated, fetch single-check via GET or POST to determine current saved state (avoid bulk-check for isolated use). Connect result to local state. Handle loading state (button disabled during fetch).

tasks.title: Integrate FavoriteButton into AccommodationCard.astro
tasks.description: Modify apps/web/src/components/shared/cards/AccommodationCard.astro to embed <FavoriteButton client:visible> with entityId, entityType=ACCOMMODATION, entityName, showCount=true, countThreshold=3. Pass initialSaved and initialCount as props (hydrated from bulk-check). Render count pill conditionally when count >= 3. Follow wireframe 4.1 positioning (top-right).

tasks.title: Implement bulk-check fetch on /alojamientos listing page
tasks.description: Modify apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/index.astro to call POST /api/v1/protected/user-bookmarks/check-bulk after fetching accommodation list. Pass initialSaved and initialCount props into AccommodationCard via the entity IDs visible. Handle unauthenticated case (skip bulk-check, all initialSaved=false). Follow spec section 10.1 (bulk-check hydration pattern).

tasks.title: Integrate FavoriteButton into EventCard, ArticleCard components
tasks.description: Modify apps/web/src/components/shared/cards/EventCard.astro and ArticleCard.astro (PostCard) to embed FavoriteButton with client:visible, correct entityType (EVENT, POST), and bulk-check hydration support. Also update RelatedPostCard.astro if applicable. Apply same count pill logic as AccommodationCard.

tasks.title: Integrate FavoriteButton into DestinationsIsland.client.tsx
tasks.description: Modify apps/web/src/components/sections/DestinationsIsland.client.tsx to inline FavoriteButton at the integration point identified in T-002. Pass entityType=DESTINATION, entityId, entityName. Add the TODO comment: // TODO: Extract to DestinationCard.astro for consistency (SPEC-098 follow-up). No standalone Astro component needed for MVP per spec section 10.7. [Consolidated — T-012 by T-041 (checkBookmarksBulk in service); T-043 by T-DC3 (FavoriteButton already in DestinationsIsland).]

tasks.title: Integrate FavoriteButton into LocationMap.client.tsx popup
tasks.description: Modify apps/web/src/components/maps/LocationMap.client.tsx to render FavoriteButton inside Leaflet popup JSX for accommodation markers. The popup already shows entity name and price per wireframe 4.2. Add FavoriteButton with entityType=ACCOMMODATION, entityId, entityName. Ensure it works inside Leaflet popup React rendering context.

tasks.title: Integrate FavoriteButton and counter into accommodation DetailHeader.astro
tasks.description: Modify apps/web/src/components/accommodation/DetailHeader.astro to embed FavoriteButton with client:idle, showCount=true, countThreshold=0, size=lg. Add public counter display following wireframe 4.3 label rules (count=0: 'Se el primero en guardarlo', count=1: '1 persona lo guardo', count>=2: 'N personas lo guardaron'). Fetch count server-side via GET /public/user-bookmarks/count.

tasks.title: Integrate FavoriteButton and counter into destination, event, post detail headers
tasks.description: Apply the same FavoriteButton + counter integration from T-045 to the detail header components for destination, event, and post pages. Identify the correct header components (e.g. apps/web/src/components/destination/DetailHeader.astro, etc.) and apply entityType=DESTINATION/EVENT/POST with the same counter label rules. One commit covering all three entity types.

tasks.title: Create CreateEditCollectionModal.client.tsx skeleton and form fields
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/components/account/CreateEditCollectionModal.client.tsx. Implement the controlled modal shell (role=dialog, aria-labelledby, open/close prop). Add form fields: name input (required, max 50), description textarea (optional, max 200). Handle create vs edit mode based on collection prop (null = create, populated = edit). No API calls yet.

tasks.title: Add color picker and icon picker to CreateEditCollectionModal
tasks.description: Extend CreateEditCollectionModal.client.tsx with: color picker (10 swatches from spec 4.7, store as 7-char hex), icon picker (@repo/icons subset relevant to travel/collections). Implement local state for color and icon selections. Show current selection visually.

tasks.title: Wire CreateEditCollectionModal API calls and error handling
tasks.description: Wire CreateEditCollectionModal.client.tsx: on submit call POST /api/v1/protected/user-bookmark-collections (create mode) or PATCH /:id (edit mode). Show inline error for 409 duplicate name. Show success toast and call onSuccess callback to refresh parent list. Use i18n keys from T-035 (collections.create.*, collections.edit.*). Connect to API with typed fetch.

tasks.title: Create MoveToCollectionModal.client.tsx skeleton with collection list
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/components/account/MoveToCollectionModal.client.tsx. Implement modal shell (role=dialog). Render radio button list of existing collections with 'Sin coleccion' first option and '+ Nueva coleccion' last option. Receive bookmarkId, currentCollectionId, and collections list as props. No API calls yet.

tasks.title: Wire MoveToCollectionModal API calls and inline create form
tasks.description: Wire MoveToCollectionModal.client.tsx: on '+ Nueva coleccion' selected, expand inline mini-form (name field only). On submit: call POST /collection-bookmarks (add) or DELETE /collection-bookmarks (remove) as appropriate. Inline create: call POST /collections then immediately add bookmark. Use i18n keys move.*. Call onSuccess on completion.

tasks.title: Refactor UserFavoritesList.client.tsx: entity type tabs
tasks.description: Add entity type tab navigation to apps/web/src/components/account/UserFavoritesList.client.tsx: tabs for Alojamientos / Destinos / Eventos / Blog. Hide tabs that have zero bookmarks for the current user. Wire tab selection to filter the bookmark fetch query. Keep existing pagination ('Cargar mas'). Use i18n keys from T-035.

tasks.title: Add 'Sin coleccion' uncollected bookmarks section to UserFavoritesList
tasks.description: Add the 'Sin coleccion' section to UserFavoritesList.client.tsx: fetch bookmarks where collectionId is null for the active entity type tab. Render bookmark cards with entity thumbnail, name, and placeholder note. Keep 'Cargar mas' pagination scoped to uncollected bookmarks.

tasks.title: Add 'Mis colecciones' grid section to UserFavoritesList
tasks.description: Add the 'Mis colecciones' section to UserFavoritesList.client.tsx: fetch user collections with includeBookmarkCount=true. Render collection grid cards showing name, color accent, icon, bookmark count, and 3-4 preview thumbnails. Integrate CreateEditCollectionModal trigger (new + edit). Integrate delete confirmation flow.

tasks.title: Wire MoveToCollectionModal trigger from bookmark cards in UserFavoritesList
tasks.description: Add a 'Mover a coleccion' button/icon to bookmark cards in UserFavoritesList.client.tsx. On click, open MoveToCollectionModal passing bookmarkId, currentCollectionId, and the loaded collections list. Refresh both uncollected and collections sections after a successful move.

tasks.title: Add inline notes editor textarea to bookmark cards
tasks.description: Extend bookmark card rendering in UserFavoritesList.client.tsx (or extract to BookmarkCard sub-component): add 'Agregar nota' button (or truncated note preview if note exists). On click expand inline textarea with current note content. Character counter (turns red at 450+ chars, hard limit 500). Save button disabled when over limit. [Consolidated into T-049d — EditableNote.tsx component already implemented inline notes editor with PATCH wiring, Ctrl+Enter, Escape, char counter (300 max per spec).]

tasks.title: Wire notes save API call and keyboard shortcut

tasks.title: Implement _canCreate limit guard in UserBookmarkCollectionService
tasks.description: In UserBookmarkCollectionService, add a private _canCreate method that: (1) reads HOSPEDA_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER env var via packages/config (default 10), (2) calls countActiveCollections for the actor, (3) throws typed error COLLECTION_LIMIT_REACHED with payload { currentCount: number, maxAllowed: number } when count >= maxAllowed. Call _canCreate from createCollection before insert. No middleware is created — guard lives entirely in the service layer. [Consolidated — _canCreate limit guard already implemented in T-019 service skeleton.]

tasks.title: Extend GET /user-bookmark-collections list response with usage block
tasks.description: Modify the GET /api/v1/protected/user-bookmark-collections list handler and its Zod response schema to include a top-level usage block: { current: number, max: number }. The handler calls countActiveCollections and reads the env var to populate both fields. Update userBookmarkCollection.http.schema.ts response type to include the usage field. The usage block allows the UI to render an 'X of Y used' counter without a separate API call. [Consolidated — usage block already in T-027 list route response.]

tasks.title: Write unit tests for the collection limit guard
tasks.description: Extend userBookmarkCollection.service.test.ts with tests for _canCreate guard: (1) count < maxAllowed — createCollection proceeds, (2) count == maxAllowed — returns COLLECTION_LIMIT_REACHED with correct { currentCount, maxAllowed }, (3) count > maxAllowed — same error, (4) env var override: HOSPEDA_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER=5 — limit enforced at 5. AAA pattern. Mock countActiveCollections and env read.

tasks.title: Write integration test for GET /user-bookmark-collections usage block
tasks.description: Extend apps/api/test/routes/user-bookmark-collections/collections.test.ts to cover: (1) list response contains usage.current and usage.max fields, (2) usage.max equals configured env var value or default 10, (3) usage.current increments after creating a collection, (4) usage block present when list is empty. tasks.title: Create ADR-026 documenting collections limit strategy
tasks.description: Create docs/decisions/ADR-026-collections-limit-strategy.md documenting: (1) choice of hardcoded env-configurable limit (HOSPEDA_MAX_COLLECTIONS_PER_USER, default 10) over plan-based billing limits, (2) rationale (collections are an organizational UX tool not a monetization lever; pre-beta, simpler is better), (3) implementation choice (guard in service _canCreate, not middleware), (4) future-proof migration path to plan-based limits if monetization needs arise. Follow ADR format from existing docs/decisions/ADR-*.md files.
